title: sql-analytics-patterns
pitch: Reusable, tested SQL templates for analytic windowing, cohorting, and KPI reporting.
keyFeatures: Dialect-aware SQL template rendering (Oracle vs Redshift differences)
Reference datasets + golden-query tests to prevent KPI regressions
Packaged patterns: RFM, basket analysis, cohorts, retention, rolling-window KPIs
targetUsers: Analytics engineers and BI developers who repeatedly implement the same reporting logic across Oracle and Redshift.
